projects.title: Tabby — AI Bookkeeper
projects.shortDescription: All-in-one AI bookkeeping for freelancers, realtors, and small business owners.
projects.description: Tabby is your all-in-one AI-powered bookkeeping and expense tracking app — built for freelancers, realtors, 1099 contractors and small business owners. Say goodbye to manual entry and tax-time panic. Built by accountants and developers who've worked with real clients.

features.title: AI Expense Tracking
features.description: Auto-sort and categorize expenses with smart rules.

features.title: Receipt Scanning
features.description: Snap a receipt and match it to transactions instantly.

features.title: Invoices
features.description: Create branded invoices and track payments.

features.title: Cash Flow Dashboard
features.description: Real-time view of income and expenses.

features.title: P&L Reports
features.description: Tax-ready statements — no spreadsheets needed.

features.title: Simple UX
features.description: No accounting jargon, easy for anyone.

projects.title: Smart Sohay
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered exam prep for SSC, HSC, admission & job exams in Bangladesh.
projects.description: Smart Sohay is an AI-powered and data-driven app built to make exam preparation smarter, faster, and more effective for SSC, HSC (Science, Commerce, Arts), University Admission Tests, and Job Exams in Bangladesh. Designed for SSC & HSC students, university admission candidates (Medical, Engineering, IBA, Private & NU), and job exam aspirants (BCS, Bank, NTRCA, Govt & Non-Govt). Whether you're preparing for board exams, university admission, or competitive job tests, Smart Sohay helps you track, test, and transform your preparation.

features.title: Personalized Exam Practice
features.description: Custom tests based on your weak and strong topics.

features.title: AI Topic Suggestions
features.description: AI analyzes performance and suggests what to study next.

features.title: Flashcards
features.description: Quick revision with science-based flashcards for last-minute prep.

features.title: Doubt Solve with AI
features.description: Photo or text questions with instant AI-powered explanations.

features.title: Question Bank
features.description: 5 lakh+ questions filtered by board, year, chapter, and topic.

features.title: Model Tests
features.description: Full-length simulated exams with detailed analytics.

features.title: Similar Questions & AI Explanation
features.description: Related question recommendations with simple concept breakdowns.

projects.title: Muslim Minds
projects.shortDescription: Islamic lifestyle app for prayer, Quran, Qibla, and spiritual growth.
projects.description: Muslim Minds is your indispensable tool for enhancing your Islamic lifestyle and spiritual growth. Tailored for devout Muslims, it offers features to facilitate religious practices and rituals with ease and precision — from accurate Salah times to Quran recitations.

features.title: Salah Times
features.description: Accurate prayer times based on your location.

features.title: Ramadan Timings
features.description: Sehri and Iftar schedules for the holy month.

features.title: Salah Calendar
features.description: Monthly prayer calendar for daily planning.

features.title: Qibla Compass
features.description: Find the Kaaba direction anywhere in the world.

features.title: Tasbih Counter
features.description: Digital dhikr and supplication tracker.

features.title: Listen to Quran
features.description: Audio recitations from renowned Qaris on demand.

projects.title: ORCA Marine
projects.shortDescription: Intelligent SaaS platform for marine survey and ship inspection management.
projects.description: ORCA Marine is a Survey Management System — an intelligent software automation solution for marine survey and inspection. Ships and container vessels require various surveys depending on circumstances; traditionally these are conducted largely manually, creating industry-wide inefficiency. ORCA Marine is a subscription-based SaaS product by Nodes Digital for marine survey and inspection firms in Bangladesh and abroad, replacing manual workflows with a cloud-based platform that eliminates complex software and hardware overhead for clients.

features.title: Survey Management
features.description: Automate and manage multiple types of marine surveys digitally.

features.title: Ship & Container Inspections
features.description: Handle surveys for ships and container vessels based on circumstances.

features.title: Cloud SaaS Platform
features.description: Subscription-based access via the internet — no on-premise software to maintain.

features.title: Digital Workflow
features.description: Replace manual survey processes with streamlined digital operations.

features.title: Global Reach
features.description: Built for marine survey firms in Bangladesh and internationally.

features.title: Custom Solutions
features.description: Tailored configurations leveraged to each client's needs.

projects.title: We Telly-BD
projects.shortDescription: Video streaming and sharing platform for discovering and recommending content.
projects.description: We Telly-BD is a video streaming and sharing platform where users discover, watch, and recommend video content. Built with a modern dark-themed experience, it supports user authentication, personalized recommendations, category-based exploration, channel profiles, and community-driven video suggestions from platforms like YouTube.

features.title: User Authentication
features.description: Email, mobile, and social login with Google, Apple, Facebook, and Twitter.

features.title: Explore & Discover
features.description: Search and filter videos by categories, tags, and sort options.

features.title: Recommended Videos
features.description: Personalized video feed based on user interests.

features.title: Channel Profiles
features.description: Creator profiles with about info, location, and content roles.

features.title: Recommend Video
features.description: Submit YouTube URLs to suggest content to the platform.

features.title: Cross-Platform
features.description: Available on Play Store and App Store.

projects.title: Agritech
projects.shortDescription: IoT-powered smart farming app for real-time crop monitoring and precision agriculture.
projects.description: Agritech by Nodes Digital transforms traditional agriculture into a cutting-edge, data-driven, and sustainable practice. With IoT, machine learning, and advanced analytics, it delivers real-time insights, precise monitoring, and data-driven decision-making — whether you're a seasoned farmer or just starting. Boost productivity, optimize resource usage, and ensure healthy crop yields with a user-friendly companion built for farms of all sizes.

features.title: Real-Time Crop Monitoring
features.description: 24/7 sensor updates on temperature, humidity, soil moisture, water level, and EC.

features.title: Data-Driven Decisions
features.description: Actionable insights for irrigation, fertilization, and pest control.

features.title: Smart Irrigation
features.description: Precise watering based on crop needs and weather conditions.

features.title: Automated Pump Controller
features.description: Schedule irrigation automatically from real-time farm data.

features.title: Crop Health Analysis
features.description: Early detection of diseases, nutrient deficiencies, and stress factors.

features.title: Offline Support
features.description: Access critical data and insights without a stable connection.

projects.title: Rakhsaani
projects.shortDescription: Spreading the message of the Holy Quran to diverse people worldwide.
projects.description: Rakhsaani is built on a dream to disseminate the message of the Holy Quran to diverse people across the globe — irrespective of race, culture, religion, Muslim or non-Muslim. The app presents the Quran in native languages for a clear understanding of its intense and accurate meaning, while promoting harmonious relations, communal peace, and goodwill so people can recognize its different aspects and resolve conflicts through goodness and virtue.

features.title: Quran in Native Languages
features.description: Clear, accurate Quran meaning accessible in local languages.

features.title: Global Reach
features.description: Designed for diverse audiences across cultures and backgrounds.

features.title: Deep Understanding
features.description: Helps users grasp the intense and accurate meaning of the Quran.

features.title: Communal Peace
features.description: Promotes harmonious relations and goodwill among communities.

features.title: Virtue & Goodness
features.description: Encourages resolving conflicts through established goodness and virtues.

features.title: Cross-Platform
features.description: Available on Android via APK download.

projects.title: JobXprss
projects.shortDescription: Bangladesh's most advanced AI-driven job platform for software professionals.
projects.description: JobXprss is the most advanced job platform in Bangladesh. Intelligent technology matches the right people with thousands of latest job postings from numerous sources, while compiled resumes are sorted to meet client requirements. Unlike other job sites, information is shared and presented in a way that best serves professionals and organizations — so job seekers are more informed about the jobs and companies they apply to. JobXprss is available anywhere through its mobile apps.

features.title: Job Search
features.description: Advanced tools automatically find the right position from numerous job sources.

features.title: Notifications
features.description: Get notified for the latest job updates as they are posted.

features.title: Job Applications
features.description: Apply for a job with a single tap on the Apply button.

features.title: Career Advice
features.description: Interview tips and guidance to help you get hired faster.

features.title: JX Profile
features.description: Build a shareable professional profile from your information.

projects.title: SkillXprss
projects.shortDescription: Skill assessment, live online courses, and workshops for career development in Bangladesh.
projects.description: SkillXprss is a platform for skill assessment, live online courses, and workshops. An initiative by Ishraak Solutions Limited, it is one of Bangladesh's leading skill assessment and career development platforms — offering trending skill tests, cost-efficient training courses, and flexible workshops for professionals and learners. SkillXprss believes people have an innate potential to multiply their personal and professional skills, and addresses the massive demand for new skills driven by rapid changes in the job sector and technology. Courses are designed with industry-standard, up-to-date resources, delivered by proficient trainers who bring real professional experience to every live session.

features.title: Free Basic Skill Tests
features.description: Assess your skill level with free basic tests across multiple domains.

features.title: Live Training Courses
features.description: Live online courses with trainers — not pre-recorded videos.

features.title: Weekend Workshops
features.description: Flexible, weekend-based day-long workshops for busy professionals.

features.title: Affordable Pricing
features.description: Courses and premium skill tests at a cost-efficient price point.

features.title: IT & Non-IT Courses
features.description: Universally accepted courses spanning IT and non-IT fields.

features.title: Diverse Skill Tests
features.description: Aptitude, math, language, programming, networking, and many more.

features.title: Instant Results
features.description: Skill test results generated instantly after completion.

features.title: Cross-Platform App
features.description: User-friendly Android and iOS app with easy enrollment.

projects.title: Amar iSchool
projects.shortDescription: Online skill development platform with expert-taught tech courses anytime, anywhere.
projects.description: Amar iSchool is an online educational skill development platform. Advance your career by developing the skills you need to succeed — watch expert-taught courses in programming, IT, and much more, anytime and anywhere. Discover the most in-demand tech and creative skills with personalized recommendations and courses taught by industry experts, covering computer science, programming, web development, data science, engineering, software engineering, and more.

features.title: Expert-Led Courses
features.description: Online classes in data science, blockchain, Python, project management, and more.

features.title: Personalized Recommendations

features.title: Quizzes & Exams
features.description: Test your knowledge as you advance through each course.

features.title: Curated Learning Paths
features.description: Explore guided course collections for structured learning.

features.title: Learn at Your Pace
features.description: Watch entire courses or individual videos on the go.

features.title: Share Courses
features.description: Share courses with your network.

features.title: Computer Science
features.description: Programming, mobile, and web development courses.

features.title: Data Science
features.description: Machine learning, statistics, probability, and data courses.

projects.title: Pix Scan
projects.shortDescription: Free offline document scanner, OCR, PDF editor, and read-aloud app — no ads, no subscriptions.
projects.description: Pix Scan is a free, offline document scanner, OCR text recognizer, and PDF editor — all in one lightweight app. Turn your phone camera into a portable scanner, extract text from images with OCR, listen to documents with built-in read aloud, and create professional PDFs. No internet, no ads, no subscriptions. Every feature works without internet — documents stay on your device with no cloud uploads or account required.

features.title: Scan to PDF
features.description: Auto-detect documents with batch scan, gallery import, and offline capture.

features.title: OCR Text Recognition
features.description: Extract, copy, search, and share text from images — works offline.

features.title: Read Aloud
features.description: Text-to-speech with voices, speed control, bookmarks, and sleep timer.

features.title: PDF Editor
features.description: Reorder, crop, merge, replace pages, and optimize compression.

features.title: Text Editor & PDF Creator
features.description: Rich text editor with A4, Letter, or custom page export to PDF.

features.title: PDF Viewer
features.description: Multi-page reader with zoom, navigation, and open-from-share support.

features.title: Document Library
features.description: Thumbnail library with page count, file size, date, and auto-import.

features.title: Easy Sharing
features.description: Share PDFs or export pages as PNG via email, WhatsApp, or any app.

features.title: Privacy-First Offline
features.description: 100% free with no ads, subscriptions, cloud, or account required.

features.title: Light & Dark Theme
features.description: Light mode, dark mode, or match your system setting.

projects.title: Labook Employee
projects.shortDescription: Employee HR app for daily salary, attendance tracking, and payroll on mobile.
projects.description: If your company has invited you to use the Labook Employee App, you can download it and start using it immediately. Check your salary every day, track attendance, submit salary component requests, and access payroll information — all from your mobile phone.

features.description: Check your salary every day directly from your phone.

features.title: Attendance Tracking
features.description: View all attendance records and ensure no check-ins or approvals are missed.

features.title: Salary Components
features.description: Submit requests for benefits, bonuses, and other salary components with one click.

features.title: Payroll & Payslips
features.description: View and download payslips whenever you need them.

projects.title: Labook Attendance
projects.shortDescription: Real-time employee management, attendance tracking, and payroll processing.
projects.description: Labook is a real-time, all-in-one employee management solution that simplifies workforce management, attendance tracking, and payroll processing anytime, anywhere. Download and sign up for free using only your phone number and business profile. Powered by modern business technology, Labook helps companies monitor employee data in real time, save time on records and payroll, and gain valuable insights to improve employee retention and workforce management — with no hidden charges.

features.title: Quick Sign Up
features.description: Register in 3 clicks with your phone number and business profile.

features.title: Employee Management
features.description: Add, edit, or delete employee records, salary details, and payment cycles.

features.title: Payroll Calculation
features.description: Automatic salary calculation from payment cycles, attendance, and income components.

features.title: Attendance Dashboard
features.description: One-click attendance tracking with real-time salary auto-calculation.

features.title: Business Insights
features.description: Workforce analytics to improve employee retention and management.

features.title: Free to Use
features.description: Full employee management on your smartphone with no hidden charges.

projects.title: Helale Pharmacy
projects.shortDescription: Pharmacy inventory management system for medicines, suppliers, and stock tracking.
projects.description: Helale Pharmacy is a pharmacy management dashboard for tracking inventory, monitoring stock levels, managing suppliers, and processing sales. Built with a modern dark-themed UI, it helps pharmacies stay on top of low stock alerts, expiring medicines, expired items, and total inventory value in real time.

features.description: Real-time stats for inventory count, low stock, expiring, and total value.

features.title: Inventory Management
features.description: Search, filter, and manage medicines with batch, box, and expiry tracking.

features.title: Low Stock Alerts
features.description: Visual alerts for low stock, expiring soon, and expired items.

features.title: Supplier Management
features.description: Manage pharmaceutical suppliers with search and quick add.

features.title: Archive
features.description: Archive medicines removed from active inventory.

features.description: Theme selection, activity log, sales reports, and sign-out.
